requirement_topic.en: ZERA / ZETDC Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz and Reliability Constraints
requirement_topic.zh: ZERA / ZETDC并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及电力可靠性约束
requirement_topic.zht: ZERA / ZETDC併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及電力可靠性約束

summary.en: Zimbabwe EV charger projects should be designed around Zimbabwe's commonly used 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply and project-specific ZETDC connection conditions under ZERA electricity regulation. The charging market is nascent and grid reliability is a practical design constraint: chronic load-shedding can limit public DC fast charging uptime and may require solar-plus-battery, backup generation, demand management, or lower-power AC deployment. ZERA / ZETDC coordination is a project gate for grid-connected charging sites, especially where high-power DC chargers, dedicated transformers, metering changes, demand charges, or embedded generation are involved.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦电动汽车充电桩项目应按当地常用的230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供电，以及ZERA电力监管下的项目特定ZETDC接入条件进行设计。当地充电市场仍处于早期，电网可靠性是实务设计约束：长期限电可能限制公共直流快充可用率，并可能需要太阳能加电池、备用发电、需求管理或较低功率交流部署。对于并网充电站，尤其是涉及大功率直流充电桩、专用变压器、计量改造、需量电费或分布式发电时，ZERA / ZETDC协调是项目门槛。
summary.zht: 辛巴威電動汽車充電樁項目應按當地常用的230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供電，以及ZERA電力監管下的項目特定ZETDC接入條件進行設計。當地充電市場仍處於早期，電網可靠性是實務設計約束：長期限電可能限制公共直流快充可用率，並可能需要太陽能加電池、備用發電、需求管理或較低功率交流部署。對於併網充電站，尤其是涉及大功率直流充電樁、專用變壓器、計量改造、需量電費或分散式發電時，ZERA / ZETDC協調是項目門檻。

standards_or_laws: ZERA electricity regulations, grid-code, and distribution-code materials
ZETDC project-specific distribution connection and commissioning conditions
Zimbabwe low-voltage supply basis: 230/400 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Zimbabwe's 230/400 V supply, local protection settings, load-shedding conditions, and ZETDC connection review require a separate site-specific assessment.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。津巴布韦230/400 V供电、当地保护参数、限电条件和ZETDC接入审查，需要单独进行现场特定评估。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。辛巴威230/400 V供電、當地保護參數、限電條件和ZETDC接入審查，需要單獨進行現場特定評估。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) charger protection, earthing, metering, harmonics, and load-management evidence fits the ZETDC site connection; (3) high-power DC charging has a credible power-availability plan under load-shedding; (4) backup solar, storage, generator, or demand-management interfaces are documented where used; (5) commissioning records are prepared for the Zimbabwe project engineer, utility, and regulator. China 220/380 V design evidence is not enough for Zimbabwe grid readiness.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 保护、接地、计量、谐波和负载管理证据适配ZETDC现场接入；(3) 大功率直流充电在限电条件下有可信的供电可用性方案；(4) 如使用备用太阳能、储能、发电机或需求管理接口，应形成文件；(5) 为津巴布韦项目工程师、公用事业机构和监管机构准备调试记录。中国220/380 V设计证据不足以证明津巴布韦并网就绪。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 保護、接地、計量、諧波和負載管理證據適配ZETDC現場接入；(3) 大功率直流充電在限電條件下有可信的供電可用性方案；(4) 如使用備用太陽能、儲能、發電機或需求管理接口，應形成文件；(5) 為辛巴威項目工程師、公用事業機構和監管機構準備調試記錄。中國220/380 V設計證據不足以證明辛巴威併網就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a charger is grid-connected, requires a new or upgraded ZETDC service, uses embedded generation or storage, or falls within ZERA-regulated project approval; exact connection conditions must be confirmed for the site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a ZERA / ZETDC approval substitute; voltage, protection, and power-availability assumptions must be re-confirmed for Zimbabwe

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Zimbabwe-ready charger package needs voltage-range confirmation, ZETDC site-connection evidence, ZERA-aware project documentation, and a power-availability strategy for load-shedding. China domestic 220/380 V design without site review is not Zimbabwe grid-ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的充电桩资料包须包括电压范围确认、ZETDC现场接入证据、符合ZERA监管语境的项目文件，以及针对限电的供电可用性方案。未经现场审查的中国国内220/380 V设计不满足津巴布韦并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的充電樁資料包須包括電壓範圍確認、ZETDC現場接入證據、符合ZERA監管語境的項目文件，以及針對限電的供電可用性方案。未經現場審查的中國國內220/380 V設計不滿足辛巴威併網要求。
